_comment: M2 calibration. The plan §7.2 documents (60, ±5) as the historical placeholder; this file is the canonical M2 source. The v1 plan's (60, ±5) was a placeholder pending M4 backtest calibration, and was refined to the values below after M2 review (2026-06-06). On recalibration: bump `version` and update `docs/plans/2026-06-03-bottlewatch-v1.md` §7.2 + `research/04_scoring_methodology.md` §7.6 to point here. Cell-matching convention: `b_prime_min` is inclusive (lower bound), `b_prime_max` is exclusive (upper bound) by default. For the lowest cell per side (e.g. RESOLVING_FROM_LOW's B' <= -15), set `b_prime_max_inclusive: true` to flip it. The cell order in `cells` is the order of the 6 cells in plan §7.6 (B >= 70 first); for ties on a boundary, the first cell in the list wins.
